expertSkills.workflowAuthor: Author installable workflows safely through staging, static validation, independent review, and user-approved import
expertSkills.workflowReview: Review installable workflows independently for semantic quality, security boundaries, portability, dependencies, and completion

ui.forcedDeleteWarning: Warning: forced deletion of {id} left these referrers dangling: {referrers}
ui.projectConsumerWarning: Warning: project-local consumers outside the current project may still exist.

errors.workflow_id_collision: The workflow ID already exists or collides with another workflow.
errors.workflow_in_use: The workflow is still referenced by a known consumer.
errors.destination_exists: The destination already exists; use --force to replace it.
errors.package_kind_mismatch: The package kind is not valid for this command.
errors.workflow_digest_conflict: The installed workflow has the same ID but different content.
errors.import_source_not_found: The import source was not found.
errors.import_source_invalid: The import source must be a workflow directory or package.

prompt.workflowPickerInstructions: Space to toggle, A to select/clear all, Enter to confirm

both.name: Both (skills + commands)
both.description: Install workflows as both skills and slash commands

propose.name: Propose change
propose.description: Turn a request into a complete proposal, specs, design, and task list

explore.name: Explore ideas
explore.description: Investigate ideas, problems, and requirements before committing to a change

new.name: Start change
new.description: Start a change and create its first artifact in the guided workflow

continue.name: Continue change
continue.description: Create the next artifact for an existing change

apply.name: Apply tasks
apply.description: Implement and track the tasks defined by a change

sync.name: Sync specs
sync.description: Merge a change's delta specs into the main specs without archiving it

archive.name: Archive change
archive.description: Finalize a completed change and move it into the archive

verify.name: Verify change
verify.description: Check that implementation matches the change artifacts before archiving

onboard.name: Onboard
onboard.description: Learn Rasen by completing a narrated workflow with real project work

help.name: Find help
help.description: Find the right Rasen command, skill, or workflow for your situation

office-hours-command.name: Office hours
office-hours-command.description: Pressure-test product demand and direction before building

verify-enhanced-command.name: Enhanced verification
verify-enhanced-command.description: Run artifact, code, security, browser, and visual checks scaled to the change

ship-command.name: Ship change
ship-command.description: Commit and deliver a completed change by PR, push, or local handoff

retro-command.name: Retrospective
retro-command.description: Review shipped work to capture patterns, decisions, and lessons

auto-command.name: Autopilot
auto-command.description: Orchestrate specialized agents through the full workflow end to end

review-cycle.name: Review cycle
review-cycle.description: Repeat review, triage, fixes, and re-review until the change is clean

handoff.name: Create handoff
handoff.description: Distill current context so another session or agent can continue

goal-plan.name: Plan goal
goal-plan.description: Define a long-running goal, success gate, and working plan

goal-iterate.name: Iterate goal
goal-iterate.description: Run one focused research or implementation round toward an active goal

goal-report.name: Report goal
goal-report.description: Evaluate goal results against the success gate and write the final report

goal-command.name: Run goal loop
goal-command.description: Orchestrate planning, iterations, and reporting for a long-running goal

ui.invalidProfileName: Profile names must be 1-64 characters, start with a lowercase letter or digit, and contain only lowercase letters, digits, dots, underscores, or hyphens.
ui.profileNameRequired: A profile name is required outside an interactive terminal.
ui.profileNewRequiresTty: `rasen profile new` requires an interactive terminal.
ui.deletionRequiresConfirmation: Deletion requires confirmation in a terminal or the --yes flag.
ui.applyGuidance: Config updated. Run `rasen update` in your projects to apply.
ui.interactiveRequired: Interactive mode required. Use `rasen profile use <name>` or set config via environment/flags.
ui.deliveryExplanation: Delivery = whether commands are installed alongside skills (skills are always installed)
ui.workflowsExplanation: Workflows = which actions are available (propose, explore, apply, etc.)
ui.configurePrompt: What do you want to configure?

both.name: Delivery and workflows
both.description: Update install mode and available actions together

workflows.name: Workflows only
workflows.description: Change which workflow actions are available

ui.driftWarning: Warning: Global config is not applied to this project. Run `rasen update` to sync.
ui.applyToProject: Apply changes to this project now?
ui.updateOtherProjects: Run `rasen update` in your other projects to apply.
ui.updateFailed: `rasen update` failed. Please run it manually to apply the profile changes.
ui.profileDeleted: Deleted profile "{name}". Current settings were not changed.
ui.useImportedProfile: Run `rasen profile use {name}` to use it.
ui.destinationExists: Destination already exists: {path}. Pass --force to overwrite it.

errors.invalidName: Profile names must be 1-64 characters, start with a lowercase letter or digit, and contain only lowercase letters, digits, dots, underscores, or hyphens.
errors.pathNotFile: Profile path is not a file: {path}
errors.fileTooLarge: Profile file is too large ({size} bytes; maximum {maximum}).
errors.profilePackageChanged: The profile package changed while it was being read.
errors.profilePackageIncomplete: The profile package is not self-contained: workflow "{workflow}" is not embedded.
errors.selfContainedRequired: Profiles containing user workflows must use a .rasenpkg destination, or --thin must be specified explicitly.

descriptions.profile: Workflow profile controlling which actions are available
descriptions.delivery: Whether commands are installed alongside skills (skills are always installed)
descriptions.language: Language for interactive prompts and CLI help (`auto` detects the system locale)
descriptions.proactive: Whether agents proactively suggest next steps
descriptions.telemetry.enabled: Send anonymous usage telemetry (environment opt-outs always win)
descriptions.schema: The workflow schema this project uses (e.g. "spec-driven")
descriptions.archive.timing: When archive runs relative to shipping a change
descriptions.handoff.threshold: Context-handoff threshold at which agents should hand off (project wins over global): a fraction in (0, 1], or an absolute { remainingTokens: N } headroom

editor.heading: Rasen configuration
editor.outsideProject: (not inside a Rasen project — project-only keys are unavailable)

command.projectNotFound: Error: no Rasen project found (no "{workspace}/" directory in this directory or its ancestors).
command.projectInitGuidance: Run 'rasen init' to create one, or omit --scope project to use global config.
command.resetGlobalOnly: Error: "rasen config reset" only supports global scope.
command.resetProjectGuidance: Project config has no bulk reset — remove or hand-edit {workspace}/config.yaml directly, or unset individual keys with "rasen config unset --scope project <key>".
command.resetAllRequired: Error: --all flag is required for reset
command.editGlobalOnly: Error: "rasen config edit" only supports global scope.
command.editProjectGuidance: Project config is hand-edited directly — open {workspace}/config.yaml in your editor, or use "rasen config set/get/unset --scope project <key>".
command.editorGuidance: Set the EDITOR or VISUAL environment variable to your preferred editor
command.configFileNotFound: Error: Config file not found at {path}

diagnostics.legacyDelivery: Note: delivery mode '{legacy}' has been consolidated into '{delivery}' (skills are always installed). Your config has been updated.
diagnostics.invalidGlobalJson: Warning: Invalid JSON in {path}, using defaults
diagnostics.projectParseFailed: Warning: could not parse {path} ({detail}); ignoring it.
diagnostics.projectNotObject: rasen/config.yaml is not a valid YAML object
diagnostics.invalidReferences: Invalid 'references' field in config (must be an array of store ids)
diagnostics.invalidReferenceEntries: Some 'references' entries are invalid, ignoring them
diagnostics.invalidReferenceRemotes: Some 'references' remotes are not non-empty strings; the ids are kept without a clone source
diagnostics.invalidSchema: Invalid 'schema' field in config (must be non-empty string)
diagnostics.invalidContext: Invalid 'context' field in config (must be string)
diagnostics.emptyArtifactRules: Some rules for '{artifactId}' are empty strings, ignoring them
diagnostics.invalidArtifactRules: Rules for '{artifactId}' must be an array of strings, ignoring this artifact's rules
diagnostics.invalidRules: Invalid 'rules' field in config (must be object)
diagnostics.emptyQualityRules: Some quality-rules are empty strings, ignoring them
diagnostics.invalidQualityRules: Invalid 'quality-rules' field in config (must be array of strings)
diagnostics.invalidStore: Warning: ignoring invalid store: field in {path} (must be a single store id string).
diagnostics.invalidProjectId: Invalid 'projectId' field in config (must be string)
diagnostics.invalidArchiveTiming: Invalid 'archive.timing' field in config (must be 'on-merge' or 'in-ship')
diagnostics.invalidArchiveDestination: Invalid 'archive.destination' field in config (must be 'in-repo', 'external', or 'prune')
diagnostics.invalidArchive: Invalid 'archive' field in config (must be an object)
diagnostics.invalidAutopilotGates: Invalid 'autopilot.gates' field in config (must be 'on' or 'off')
diagnostics.invalidAutopilotSelection: Invalid 'autopilot.selection' field in config (must be 'classify', 'manual', or 'compose')
diagnostics.invalidAutopilot: Invalid 'autopilot' field in config (must be an object)
diagnostics.invalidHandoffThreshold: Invalid 'handoff.threshold' field in config (must be a number in (0, 1], or an object { remainingTokens: <positive integer> })
diagnostics.invalidHandoff: Invalid 'handoff' field in config (must be an object)

ui.autoDetectFailed: Error: Could not auto-detect shell. Please specify shell explicitly.
ui.unsupportedShell: Error: Shell '{shell}' is not supported yet. Currently supported: {supported}

telemetry.notice: Note: Rasen sends anonymous usage stats (command, version, OS, Node version, and a random id) to its own Cloudflare Worker. Opt out: RASEN_TELEMETRY=0
